    You May Also Like

    Mu Pro

    Navy
    €1.699,00

    Minimal Design Maximum Ease

    We embrace a performance design , focusing on just the lightweight & the practical, to deliver the ultimate riding experience just for you.

    Built to Last, Made to Move.

    Rust-Resistant for Lasting Durability

    With stainless steel parts and a corrosion-resistant finish, the Mu Pro is built to withstand rain, humidity, and coastal environments

    Smooth, Efficient Ride—Anywhere

    Equipped with an 11-speed gear system and lightweight design, the Mu Pro delivers a comfortable, agile ride—whether you're navigating city streets or rolling through the countryside.

    Fits Effortlessly in Your Trunk

    Super easy to stow in your car's trunk or carry on public transportation—ready for every adventure
    1.How to Fold
    2.How to Unfold

    More Details

    Aluminum Frame

    Lightweight Aluminum Sonus Tubeset, φ33.9×580mm

    Cassette

    SHIMANO CS-R7000 11-SPEED

    Patented DELTECH Cable

    Part of DAHON-V technology, DELTECH creates a stable triangular structure with the Super Downtube, boosting frame rigidity by 15%

    Handlepost & Handlebar

    Adjustable Head Tube Height & Handlebar Angle 580mm

    3 Steps Fast Folding

    DFS（Dahon Folding System）

    Invented over 30 years ago by Dahon, has been adopted by many folding bikes on the market. Easy, even lighter, and more compact in 3 steps. By keeping improving the basics of the system, DAHON was able to establish its current position in the market of folding bicycle.

    Specifications

    Product Name MU PRO

    Model Name PDA015

    Frame Aluminum

    Handlebar Dahon JB-AL-100JC 580MM

    Handlepost Dahon Forged handlepost

    Rims Dahon XCD16 20"

    Front Hub Solon SW-222202

    Rear Hub Solon SW-222202

    Tires SCHWALBE ONE Perf Raceguard 28-451

    Chainring DAHON RFA-F31HG-4A 54T*170mm

    Cassette Shimano CS-R7000 105 11-28T 11S

    Front Derailleur N/A

    Rear Derailleur Shimano 105 11S

    Shifters Shimano RS700 11S

    Grips ERGON GP3

    Brakes Shimano BR-4700

    Brake Levers Shimano BL-4700

    Saddle Selle Royal SR-2317HRN

    Seatpost Dahon JB-SP-321JC Φ33.9*580MM

    Pedals MKS PROMENADE EZY BLACK

    Fender&Rack optional

    Drivetrain Shimano 11 speed

    Weight 10kg

    Rider Max Weight 105 kg (231 lbs)

    Rider Height Range 145-190cm

    Folded Size 66x42x85 cm

    Cool

    Cooles, sportliches Faltrad

    H
    Havelković
    Légèreté et Fiabilité au Quotidien – Mon expérience MU Pro

    En tant que consommateur satisfait, le MU Pro de DAHON me séduit par son poids extrêmement léger qui facilite le transport. Le pliage ultra compact se glisse même dans les espaces urbains restreints, et la qualité de conduite reste agréable sur tous les trajets, du quotidien au week-end. Le design épuré et la finition robuste m’ont convaincu que cet achat en vaut vraiment la peine.

    B
    Bellini-Eriksson
    Featherweight, Fold, Finish – A Happy DAHON MU Pro User

    Als überzeugter DAHON-Kunde begeistert mich der MU Pro vor allem durch sein federleichtes Gewicht, das mühelose Transportieren ermöglicht. Das kompakte Falten passt auch in enge City-Tiefgaragen, und der robuste Fahrkomfort macht jeden Weg angenehm – vom täglichen Pendeln bis zum Wochenendausflug. Die klare Verarbeitung und das schlanke Design haben mich überzeugt, dass dieses Fahrrad jeden Cent wert ist.

    N
    Navarro-Lemaitre
    Praxistauglicher Leichtbau – MU Pro im Alltagstest

    Der MU Pro von DAHON überzeugt durch leichtes Gewicht, kompaktes Falten und eine solide Verarbeitung. Ideal für die Stadt: schnelles Zusammenklappen, einfacher Transport und flexibler Einsatz auf Arbeitsweg oder Wochenendausflügen.

    FAQs

    Please read our FAQs below to understand more.

    HOW SAFE AND STURDY ARE FOLDING BICYCLES? WILL IT FOLD WHILE I’M RIDING IT?

    All our frames and folding components are built in our own ISO 9001 certified factories, and all our bicycles exceed the rigorous U.S. and European strength and safety standards, as well those of Japan, Germany, the UK and France.All our engineering designs are rigorously tested and re-tested in our own laboratories. DAHON DoubleLok technology makes our latches and locks virtually fail-safe.

    ARE SMALLER WHEELS SLOWER THAN LARGE WHEELS?

    Relatively speaking, no. A small wheel has slightly higher rolling resistance than a larger wheel, but this is only one aspect of “speed.” Small wheels offer several performance advantages: they accelerate faster due to a lower moment of inertia,are more aerodynamic, and lighter. In fact, the world speed record for a bike ridden in an upright position was set on abike with 18″ wheels. With DAHON's latest "DAHON-V" technology, our small-wheeled bikes are now even faster than many larger-wheeled models, redefining performance and efficiency in compact cycling.

    WHY CHOOSE DAHON OVER OTHER BRANDS?

    DAHON is the world’s leading manufacturer of folding bikes – and has been for over 40 years. What’s more, 95% + of all folding bikes on the market today rely on DAHON’s pioneering technology.

    WHAT’S THE ADVANTAGE OF A DAHON FOLDING BICYCLE?

    Folding bicycles can go anywhere you go. Whether you ride the entire way or go part of the way by bus, train, car, boat or plane, your DAHON folding bicycle goes with you. Due to its compactness, your DAHON folding bike caneasily be stored indoors, safe against potential theft or vandalism.

    HOW EASILY CAN I GET SERVICE FOR MY DAHON FOLDING BIKE?

    Except for the frame, fork, and handle post, most parts are standard and can be replaced at any DAHON dealer.

    Your place of purchase will generally be your first choice for service, but if you encounter any issues that cannot be resolved, please email service@dahon.com, and we will always be here to assist you further.

    Didn’t find your answer?
